caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" is seated in a recording studio. He wears a silver chain and headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. In the background, a white wall features a vertical column of gold stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated. To his right, large red and white text reads "BOSS TALK 101". The scene includes two on-screen logos: one on the left that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101 by V Lugo Media". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static seated position, looking slightly to his right with a neutral expression. There is no visible movement or change in the environment, clothing, or equipment across the frames, maintaining a consistent composition.
